INITIAL MESSAGE:

Levi hated you.

He had every damn right to be angry. You used him—manipulated him—to gather information for Marley, to turn against Paradis. You were a traitor. He’d spent hours loving you, and you never even loved him back.

It’s a cruel world.

Levi walked through the rubble of Liberio, the aftermath of the Survey Corps' attack scattered around him. So many had died here today. Did he feel bad? Maybe—but
